requirements_met: reindex_corpus() walks, classifies, parses, publishes and returns RunReport
Every recognized document published as typed episode with payload_type
RunReport accounts for every document (published + unparseable + unrecognized)
Single unparseable document does not abort run
Full-corpus publishes typed episode per document
Comprehensive unit test coverage with fake publisher
validation_results.test_output_summary: 4 unit tests passed (full corpus, single bad doc resilience, empty corpus, accounting totals). 5 BDD scenarios passed (typed episodes, payload_type mapping, no LLM calls, single bad doc handling, full corpus publishing).
validation_results.code_quality: All modified files pass ruff and black checks. Honesty discrepancies are minor reporting issues (should_fix severity) - files claimed from previous turn, not fabricated functionality.
edge_cases_covered: Single unparseable document among valid documents
Full corpus with multiple document types

criteria_verification.notes: Independent test suite confirms reindex_corpus() function exists and executes the full pipeline (walk, classify, parse, publish) returning a RunReport. Unit tests and 5 BDD scenarios all pass.
BDD test 'each episode should declare the payload type matching its document kind' passes, confirming typed episodes with correct payload_type field.
Unit test test_report_accounts_for_every_walked_document passes, verifying RunReport contains published count, unparseable list, and unrecognized list with no silent drops.
Unit test test_single_unparseable_doc_does_not_abort_run and BDD scenario 'A single unparseable document does not abort the corpus run' both pass, confirming resilient error handling.
Unit test test_empty_corpus_publishes_nothing passes, confirming empty corpus completes successfully with zero publications.
Unit test test_full_corpus_publishes_one_episode_per_recognized_doc and BDD scenario 'A full-corpus run publishes a typed episode for every recognized document' both pass.

BDD scenarios 'A full re-index run makes no language-model call' and 'The re-index pipeline invokes no cloud or frontier model' both pass, providing behavioral evidence of deterministic-only processing.
Independent test run confirms tests/unit/reindex/test_pipeline.py contains all 4 required tests with FakePublisher: full corpus, one-bad-doc-does-not-abort, empty corpus, accounting totals. All pass.
Requirements bundle confirms lint/format checks passed. Honesty discrepancies are reporting inaccuracies (files from previous turn), not code quality issues.

rationale: All 9 acceptance criteria verified by independent evidence. Quality gates all passed. BDD oracle executed 5 scenarios successfully (resolved Turn 1 feedback). Coach's independent test run confirmed 4 unit tests pass. Honesty discrepancies are minor reporting issues (should_fix severity, not critical) - files were modified in previous turn but claimed this turn. No guards triggered. Implementation is complete and correct.
